title: VORCE — Workforce Intelligence & Operations Platform
description: An end-to-end workforce intelligence and business operations platform combining employee directories, attendance tracking, task management, and desktop device analytics.
longDescription:
VORCE is an integrated, end-to-end workforce intelligence and business operations platform designed to help organizations streamline employee management, monitor work activities, and extract real-time operational insights. I developed the platform end-to-end, starting from the responsive Next.js landing page to building the comprehensive web dashboard, and integrating the complete mobile and desktop telemetry systems.

At its core, VORCE unites GPS/Face ID attendance tracking, shift scheduling, task coordination, OCR receipt reimbursement, and organizational knowledge databases into a single responsive portal. By integrating device telemetry from the VLinked desktop agent, the platform's intelligence engine aggregates raw system activity into higher-level workforce signals. This generates real-time analytics for focus ratios, productivity scores, workload levels, and behavioral trends, presenting an executive view of team performance while maintaining data privacy and security.

title: VLinked — Desktop Monitoring Agent
description: Electron-powered cross-platform desktop telemetry agent capturing device and active-window analytics for VORCE.
longDescription:
VLinked Desktop Agent is a lightweight, cross-platform desktop monitoring agent developed as part of the VORCE ecosystem. It runs silently on macOS, Windows, and Linux machines to collect essential telemetry metrics, enabling companies to track employee device health, app-specific usage, and active work times.

As the Lead Desktop Developer, I built the agent using Electron, ensuring high-efficiency monitoring without high system overhead. Key implementations included secure OAuth token persistence via the OS keychain (DPAPI/safeStorage), background tracking systems using systeminformation and powerMonitor for idle-time checking, and a sandboxed IPC renderer architecture. All metric updates stream directly to the centralized VORCE API, serving as the single point of entry to ensure absolute data consistency and system security.

title: DermDoc — Skin Scan & Consult App
description: Skin disease scan and consultant mobile app powered by deep learning.
longDescription:
DermDoc is a revolutionary application that aims to provide a complete user experience for dermatological needs. It features skin disease scanner APIs powered by 3 state-of-the-art Deep Learning classification models. The app predicts with considerably high accuracy if a user is suffering from Melanoma (the most fatal type of skin cancer) or other cancer types (basal cell carcinoma and 7 other types), as well as common allergies.

As Team Leader and ML Lead, I designed the product end-to-end, integrated medication database and doctor-appointment booking APIs, and built the mobile app scanner functionality to make skin cancer awareness and consulting easily accessible.

title: Smart Home Dashboard
description: A comprehensive IoT dashboard for real-time monitoring and control of smart home automation systems.
longDescription:
A powerful IoT smart home dashboard that consolidates status, controls, and environmental parameters in a single, user-friendly portal. It integrates microcontrollers with a real-time database, enabling remote operations, scheduling, and device status alerts.

I built the dashboard frontend and backend APIs to support instant commands and live telemetry streams, making device automation seamless and responsive.

title: Smart Vehicle App
description: Mobile application enabling vehicle telemetry data gathering, control, and remote monitoring.
longDescription:
Developed and implemented a smart vehicle application allowing users to control and monitor vehicles remotely. It integrates hardware sensors that stream vehicle health indices, location, and lock status, communicating with the IoT cloud to provide drivers with real-time feedback and control.

My role was developing the C firmware for the hardware interfaces and scripting the telemetry gathering pipeline in Python, connecting vehicle telemetry to mobile clients.

title: Smart Fleet Management (Velinked)
description: Comprehensive vehicle fleet management and driver behavior tracking platform leveraging IoT.
longDescription:
Velinked is an innovative fleet management solution leveraging IoT technology to provide comprehensive vehicle tracking, remote control, and driver behavior monitoring. The platform integrates advanced features that empower fleet managers to optimize vehicle usage, reduce operational costs, and ensure vehicle security while promoting responsible driving practices.

As Team Leader & IoT Engineer, I developed the tracking systems and behaviour scoring algorithms, building end-to-end telemetry systems.

title: Driver Behavior & Telemetry Dashboard
description: Interactive dashboard for vehicle operators displaying behavioral analytics, speeds, and trips.
longDescription:
An interface built for drivers in a fleet to view their driving safety scores, review historical trips, and receive alerts regarding dangerous behaviors like sudden acceleration or hard braking.

I designed and engineered this responsive dashboard, translating raw telemetry events into actionable score indicators for drivers.
